title: MC:SM Items (Decorative)
description:
This mod adds items, blocks, and the ultimate tools from Minecraft: Story Mode
It also adds some old removed features from regular Minecraft (that can be made in Mcreator)
body:
This mod adds items, blocks, and the ultimate tools from Minecraft: Story Mode It also adds some old removed features from regular Minecraft (that can be made in Mcreator)

I am going to list the MC:SM Items and then the Minecraft items:
The Ultimate Tool (command block enchanted) Set
The Redstone Heart (a lot of the blocks are decorative and do nothing)
Prismarine Sword, Axe, And Broken Bow
A "Broken Old Amulet"
The scrapped "Glitch Block"
The diamond minecart (item)
Blue flint and steel (wip)
Elixir (kinda bad)
Portal atlas (useless)

Now the Minecraft items:
Rose (replaced by the poppy in vanilla)
Blue/Cyan Rose (Pocket Edition)
Fish Item (and the cooked variant)

Now my own features:
Ultimate Gem (for making the ultimate tool set)
(useless) explanation for the ultimate gem [creative only]
Collector villager and table
Prismarine Rod (for making the prismarine tools)

This mod does NOT add the wither storm (i cant make that) please support nonamecrackers' awesome wither storm mod
